title: Personal Site Build Log
summary: The site itself as a proof of workflow: branch discipline, content architecture, dynamic data loading, and iterative delivery.

logs.title: Created GitHub-backed project data layer
logs.details: Added the dedicated Personal_site_data repository structure with a project index and individual JSON project records so project content can be maintained separately from the static frontend code.

logs.title: Built multipage portfolio archive branch
logs.details: Moved the site beyond the placeholder page on the portfolio-archive-v1 branch, adding the home, projects, progress log, operating system, and contact pages, shared styling, project rendering logic, and modal-based project case files.

logs.title: Fixed project modal behavior below sticky header
logs.details: Patched the project modal CSS and stylesheet cache behavior so project detail windows render below the sticky navigation header on desktop and mobile instead of overlapping the header.

nextSteps: Prepare content for public portfolio review
